sources.title: Ella Cinders (film)
sources.channelName: Public Domain Movies - Classic Old Movies

metadata.Plot: Poor Ella Cinders is much abused by her evil step-mother and step-sisters. When she wins a local beauty contest she jumps at the chance to get out of her dead-end life and go to Hollywood, where she is promised a job in the movies. When she arrives in Hollywood, she discoves that the contest was a scam and the job non-existant. But through pluck, luck, and talent, she makes it in the movies anyway, and finds true love.
metadata.Writer: Mervyn LeRoy, Frank Griffin, George Marion Jr.
metadata.Actors: Colleen Moore, Lloyd Hughes, Vera Lewis
